channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Could cosmic memory explain dark matter, dark energy, and black holes?
item.description: A new theory proposes the universe records its own history in spacetime, potentially solving cosmic mysteries.

item.title: Scientists discover spider that disguises itself as a parasitic fungus
item.description: A new Amazonian spider, Taczanowskia waska, mimics a parasitic fungus as a form of camouflage.

item.title: Vaquita gets a digital lifeline as it nears extinction
item.description: Researchers created detailed 3D models of a vaquita skeleton to preserve the world's most endangered marine mammal digitally.

item.title: Most food ingredients remain a mystery, scientists say
item.description: Scientists explore thousands of hidden food chemicals beyond nutrition labels, revealing a largely unknown chemical world in our diet.
